info.title: MyTime Partners API
info.description: MyTime is an appointment scheduling app, point-of-sale and customer engagement cloud-based platform for multi-location chains and franchises. This Partners API provides management of clients, appointments, classes, locations, employees, and more.

get.summary: Returns all clients from the system that the user has access to

parameters.name: id_is_partner
parameters.description: Set true if id is a partner ID

put.summary: Update a pet or a child

get.summary: Returns all deals from a specific location

delete.summary: Deletes a class and its settings

get.summary: Returns all bundle purchases for a client
Returns all employees from the system
Labels that can be attached to clients

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key
